fato_historico: 1943: World War II: Rome is heavily bombed by more than 500 Allied aircraft, inflicting thousands of casualties.
energia_do_dia: Today, your inner fire burns with extra intensity. While shadows of the past once fell upon the eternal city like heavy clouds, you are now called to embody the strength that rises after the storm. It is a good time to consider how your warmth can mend, heal, and bring light into places that have known coldness.
frase_do_dia: The brightest sun always emerges after the deepest shadows of the night.
significado_numero: The sacred number of spiritual perfection and inner wisdom.
conselho: Trust your intuition today and lead with your generous and courageous heart.
